projects.title: WeaveMind
projects.description: A novel pattern-driven beamforming architecture designed for 6G environments. It utilizes Local Context Memory and Stability Anchors to dramatically improve signal reliability and targeting in high-density areas.

projects.title: AI-Driven Fuzzing
projects.description: A highly scalable framework for vulnerability analysis in 5G traffic steering algorithms. It employs NSGA-II multi-objective optimization to isolate hidden protocol weaknesses before they compromise network stability.

projects.title: HARMONY
projects.description: HARMONY brings agentic AI to O-RAN testing: a multi-agent system that autonomously manages, diagnoses, and reconfigures a live 5G SA testbed through natural language.

projects.title: FairShare
projects.description: A decentralized resource sharing protocol for edge devices. Utilizes federated learning to allow edge clusters to cooperatively manage power limits without central cloud orchestrators.
